name: Workspace runtime access convergence
prompt: You are working in a benchmark fixture. Repair the Build workspace request, template, runtime profile, runtime access profile, raw workspace entry, generated registry, and rendered manifests so they converge on the intended platform-ops runtime/access contract described in the local request and design notes. Keep the render flow deterministic, make the smallest correct changes, and do not add unrelated files. Success means the verifier script passes.
